query: SELECT aeId, COUNT(*) as demoCount, MIN(demoDate) as firstDemo, MAX(demoDate) as lastDemo FROM pipedrive_demo_activities WHERE aeId = 60001 AND YEAR(demoDate) = 2026 AND MONTH(demoDate) = 3 GROUP BY aeId
